creator: freebsd@moosefs.com
text:
Created attachment 155422
Ports for MooseFS Metalogger 2.0.61-1

The new port sysutils/moosefs-metalogger: MooseFS Metalogger version 2.0.61-1. 

We created totally new (and official) ports and we want to become the ports maintainer.

In attachment is a tarball containing ports tree for MooseFS Metalogger.
